default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss growth strategies and resource allocation for Augment's marketing efforts with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to focus on SEO, micro-products, and newsletter growth as primary initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Aiming for 60,000 new users/month, with budget and specific cost-per-signup targets to be determined](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [GrowthX to get direct access to Augment's website/repo for faster implementation](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Influencer strategy to be further discussed with Emma in a separate meeting](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Current Growth Metrics and Capacity

  - [New user growth previously limited by capacity issues, now resolved](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [Current metrics show flat-ish growth due to past limitations](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
  - [Activation and paid conversion rates have room for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
  - [Revenue is increasing, but aiming for more exponential growth](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)

### GrowthX Resource Allocation

  - [Shift from swim-lane approach to a more integrated team structure](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2332.0)
  - [GrowthX to be involved in Monday morning meetings with senior Augment team](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
  - [Focus on projects that directly impact user growth numbers](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2322.0)
  - [Non-negotiable focus on improving organic traffic and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)

### Website and Technical Access

  - [Augment launching new 5-page simplified website on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)
  - [GrowthX to get access to repo and Sanity for direct implementation](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2562.0)
  - [Aim to reduce blockers for GrowthX team to execute quickly](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)

### SEO and Content Strategies

  - [Programmatic SEO approach, similar to successful Vappy case (96/100 pages getting impressions in 3 days)](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2414.0)
  - [Create use-case pages and other SEO-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2449.0)
  - [Explore lower-risk content strategies on separate platforms before implementing on main site](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2676.0)

### Newsletter Strategy

  - [Plan to import existing subscribers into a new newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2575.0)
  - [Use Beehiiv platform, requesting enterprise account for better deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2585.0)
  - [Leverage newsletter for cross-promotion and potential revenue through sponsored content](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2589.0)

### Influencer Program

  - [Current agency relationship not fully satisfactory](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2821.0)
  - [Discuss potential "contributor network" approach, similar to TechBeacon model](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [Further strategy session planned with Emma to align on approach](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Code Library Project

  - [Aiming to launch MVP by Monday to start indexing and learning process](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2655.0)
  - [Potential platform for testing riskier content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
  - [Considering integration with newsletter and other growth initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sylvain to provide cost-per-signup data for paid programs as benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2118.0)
  - [GrowthX to submit proposal for achieving 60,000 new users/month](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)
  - [Sylvain to schedule meeting with Emma regarding influencer strategy](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [GrowthX to get access to new website/repo after Monday launch](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2562.0)
  - [Implement newsletter strategy, starting with subscriber import](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2575.0)
  - [Continue development of Code Library MVP for Monday launch](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2622.0)
  - [Sylvain to create shared Notion doc for newsletter strategy alignment](https://fathom.video/share/dAx3jWZzyuCJ9jqJkX9ffjz5jgY52t-o?tab=summary&timestamp=2578.0)

action_items.description: Provide cost per signup data for paid programs to Sylvain for comparison
Share access to new website (launching Monday) with Marcel's team
Create Notion doc re newsletter plan, share w/ Ami & Chris for feedback
Set up & launch newsletter using Beehive, import existing subscribers
Book meeting w/ Emma & Marcel to discuss influencer program strategy
Schedule recurring meetings w/ Marcel & George for ongoing collaboration
